_comment: Bad case 10 — EU VFR must never receive a squawk code from ATC. 7000 is a pilot-selected conspicuity code in the EU; templates only mention squawks in the US region. A silent template refactor could accidentally carry 'squawk 1200' (US) into EU files — this test guards every expected response during a full VFR departure flow with expect_not: 'squawk'.
name: Bad case 10 — EU VFR no squawk anywhere (LSZG)

say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo from parking request taxi

say.note: Step 2 — Ground: ready for departure VFR on course
say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo holding short ready for departure on course
Grenchen Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo ready for departure on course
Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo on course approved wilco

say.note: Step 5 — leaving the frequency (EU phraseology, never a squawk code)
say.text: Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo leaving your frequency good day
